name: Sandstorm Gold Ltd.
description: Sandstorm Gold Ltd. was a Vancouver-based gold royalty and streaming company with a portfolio of over 250 royalties across North America, South and Central America, Africa, and Asia-Pacific. The company provided upfront financing to mining operators in exchange for net smelter return royalties and gold streams, giving it exposure to production without operational risk. Sandstorm Gold was acquired by Royal Gold Inc. in October 2025 for approximately US$3.5 billion, ending its independent listing on the TSX.
